posts.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 March Update Lands in the UK — Here's What's New
posts.excerpt: Samsung's March 2026 security update is now rolling out to Galaxy S25, S25+, and S25 Ultra across the UK and Europe. It bundles 67 patches — 60 from Google and 7 from Samsung. If your phone hasn't updated yet, check Settings > Software update now.

posts.title: Millions of iPhones at Risk After 'DarkSword' Hack Tool Leaks Online
posts.excerpt: A powerful iPhone hacking toolkit called DarkSword has leaked onto GitHub, putting an estimated 221 million devices at risk. Anyone still on iOS 18.6.2 or below needs to update right now — Apple's emergency patch is already out.

posts.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Is Here: Everything You Need to Know
posts.excerpt: Nintendo has officially launched the Switch 2 with a larger 8-inch OLED screen, magnetic Joy-Cons, and 4K output when docked. It's backwards compatible with most Switch 1 titles and launches at £349. Early hands-on reviews are glowing.

posts.title: M4 MacBook Air: Is It the Best Laptop of 2026?
posts.excerpt: Apple's M4 MacBook Air hits 22 hours of battery life in real-world tests, blowing the competition out of the water. It runs cool, boots in seconds, and starts at £1,099. Here's what makes it so impressive — and who it's not for.

posts.title: Major UK Banks Hit by Phishing Wave — How to Stay Safe
posts.excerpt: Thousands of UK customers received fake 'suspicious activity' texts this week impersonating Barclays and Lloyds. The scam harvests login details in under 90 seconds. Here's exactly what the messages look like and how to protect yourself.

posts.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra Camera: We Tested It for a Month
posts.excerpt: The 200MP main sensor combined with Galaxy AI produces genuinely stunning night shots. But is the £1,299 price tag justified? After 30 days of daily shooting in Leicester, here's our honest verdict.

posts.title: Your Old Laptop Might Be Spying on You — Here's How to Check
posts.excerpt: Security researchers uncovered pre-installed spyware on budget laptops sold through several UK retailers. The malware runs silently in the background, uploading screenshots every 30 minutes. We explain how to scan your device and what to do if you find it.

posts.title: PS5 Pro vs Xbox Series X: Which Console Is Worth It in 2026?
posts.excerpt: Six months on from the PS5 Pro launch, the upgrade debate is still raging. We compared performance in 10 titles, analysed the price-per-frame, and asked: if you only own one console, which should it be?

posts.title: Google Pixel 9a Leaked: Flagship Features at Half the Price
posts.excerpt: Leaked renders and spec sheets reveal the Pixel 9a will pack the same Tensor G5 chip as the Pixel 9 Pro, a 50MP main camera, and 7 years of OS updates — all for under £500. Could this be the best-value phone of the year?

posts.title: Windows 11 Update Kills Performance on Older PCs — Fix Inside
posts.excerpt: The March 2026 Windows 11 cumulative update is causing 40-60% slowdowns on Intel 8th and 9th gen machines. Microsoft has acknowledged the issue. Here's the manual fix to restore your machine's speed while you wait for the patch.

posts.title: iPhone 17 Air: Apple's Thinnest iPhone Ever — Specs Confirmed
posts.excerpt: At just 5.5mm thin, the iPhone 17 Air is confirmed to replace the Plus model. It ditches a physical SIM slot entirely, sports a new 48MP ultra-wide, and introduces the first Apple-designed 5G modem. Expect it to launch in September.

posts.title: Steam Deck 2 Confirmed: What Valve Has Announced So Far
posts.excerpt: Valve has officially confirmed the Steam Deck 2 is in development, promising a larger screen, OLED display, and longer battery life. No release date yet, but leaked specs suggest it will run AMD's newest Ryzen mobile chip.

posts.title: Ransomware Hits 3 UK Schools — Is Your Child's Data Safe?
posts.excerpt: Three secondary schools in the Midlands were hit by ransomware this week, exposing pupil records, staff payroll data, and medical information. Experts say under-resourced school IT departments are now prime targets. Here's what parents should know.

posts.title: OnePlus 13 Review: The Android Phone That Challenges Samsung
posts.excerpt: With a 6000mAh battery, Snapdragon 8 Elite chip, and 100W fast charging, the OnePlus 13 is a serious challenger at £799. It charges from flat to full in 27 minutes and matches the Galaxy S25 in most benchmarks.
